title: centaurea alexandrina
intro: Centaurea alexandrina, also known as the Alexandrian cornflower, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea alexandrina include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and improving skin health. Centaurea alexandrina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical cream for various herbal remedies.
